name: io.github.5hiel/poppify
description: MCP server for photo to TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and Facebook video. Upload 1–10 photos, get a captioned 15/30/60s reel with motion, library-matched music, and optional voiceover. 27 MCP tools covering register/wallet, session creation, slide editing, audio matching, asset generation, and confirm/render. Recipe-driven composition (14 narrative frameworks), library-first audio. $0.06 base render, 50 free seeds on signup, no subscription. Built for SMBs (5–19 employees) and solo service providers.
